content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market in risk-off mode: Nifty -1.40%, IT crushed -5.43%, VIX +5.65% to 19.64. Every major sector red. Book is already 68% deployed with mild unrealized loss. This is a day for position management, not fresh aggressive entries. RELIANCE/INDUSINDBK results pending post-market adds event risk.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23700,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 5.8% but SL at 74.50 still 3% below CMP of 76.94. Strong Q4 numbers (PAT +27%) and PSU bank sector structurally strong (best MTD leader). Thesis intact; let SL handle risk. Not tightening because recent pullback already tested the low — tightening further risks whipsaw exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1011.65,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +4.7% with strong Q4 (record PAT, GNPA <1%), broker TP 1143. SL already at 1011.65 which is above entry 984 — effectively locking ~2.8% gain. This is already above breakeven so no further tightening needed; holding target at 1100 intact. Note: since new SL = current SL and new target = current target, this is a no-op — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hold at -0.9%. Gold structural bull phase intact, Akshaya Tritiya demand Apr 29 catalyst. SL at 119 (~4% below) is appropriate for ETF volatility. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1405.00,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high, strong Q4 (PAT +27%, double-digit volume). Current SL 1400 barely below entry 1412.94 — slight tighten to 1405 protects marginal gain. Target trimmed to 1480 (more achievable, R:R remains favorable). Defensive FMCG outperformer in this risk-off tape."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.00,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 3,
      "reasoning": "Binary event risk: board meeting Apr 27 with FY26 results. Current SL 1045 is below entry 1049 — no-op on SL. Actually no change needed; will HOLD. Revising to HOLD since values unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "At +0.4%, near 52w high. SL 672 is 1.7% below CMP — already tight. Q4 results Apr 29 — binary event. Holding through with current SL. Not tightening further to avoid pre-event whipsaw."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.9% today, giving back the post-Nestle read-through rally. SL at 2260 still ~2% below CMP. Thesis (rural recovery, Q4 results Apr 30) intact. Not adding, not cutting — let SL work. If breaks 2260 we exit cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 1% at 400.45. SL 393 is 1.9% below — tight. Power sector structurally strong, results May 15. Holding; SL tight enough."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "reasoning": "SL intact; PSU bank thesis strong; let it breathe."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1011.65,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry — locked in gains. Let target 1100 play out."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge — no change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1405.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginally trail SL from 1400 to 1405 — tightens to protect breakeven in choppy market."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.00,
      "reasoning": "Binary event Apr 27 — tight SL already below entry is acceptable; no change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 672.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL 1.7% below — protects position ahead of Apr 29 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2260.00,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact ahead of Apr 30 results; SL 2% below CMP is appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 393.00,
      "reasoning": "SL tight enough at 1.9% below CMP."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "SCHAEFFLER: +1.60% outperforming autos with Q4 on Apr 29 — monitor for clean entry on pullback to 4200 with tight SL. NAVINFLUOR: strong print expected Apr 29 but already rallied 51% YoY — wait for post-event clarity. INDUSINDBK: avoid — governance/SFIO overhang, don't catch falling knife with today's results risk. RELIANCE: post-result reaction tomorrow; no pre-position. COALINDIA/HUDCO/JIOFIN: relative strength names worth tracking but not chasing in broad risk-off tape.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 68% deployed, 8 positions, mild unrealized loss. Cluster check: financials heavy (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK) ~28% of capital — at the edge of cluster discipline. Defensive tilt (NESTLEIND, HINDUNILVR, GOLDBEES, GRANULES, NTPC) is appropriate for current tape. Per deployment-hysteresis rule (>60% deployed + flat-to-negative P&L), default is NO new entries today. Priority: defend book, let winners (PNBHOUSING, NESTLEIND) breathe toward targets, let SLs handle losers. VIX +5.65% and Nifty IT -5.4% suggests further downside risk in tape — staying defensive is correct. Will reassess tomorrow post RELIANCE/INDUSINDBK reaction."
}
